beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: "DAAAAVE! What a COINCIDENCE!" It is not a coincidence.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: Your shoulders drop two inches. Your soul considers an exit.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: "Every person here — EVERY PERSON — is a POTENTIAL NODE in the network."
Dad's soul briefly exits the body, tours the yard, comes back disappointed.

find_you.speaker: Kevin
find_you.text: "I have a sixth sense for UNTAPPED MARKETS, Dave. Also I saw your minivan." He hands you more brochures. You already have brochures.

escape.text: You power-walk away. Kevin calls after you: 'THE FUNNEL WAITS FOR NO MAN, DAVE!' Two strangers look concerned.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: "Dave! My TOP regional ambassador!" He claps your shoulder. It hurts. Lovingly.

beats.speaker: Kevin
beats.text: "I was just telling these good people about... Phase FOUR."

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: Phase Four. There has never been a Phase Four. He is inventing it. Now. Live.
His belief is total. His belief does not require evidence. His belief is the evidence.

phase_four.text: Kevin's face lights up like Christmas. He doesn't know what Phase Four is yet but he's already drawing on the nearest flat surface. A receipt. It looks like a pyramid. It IS a pyramid. It always was.
